steps.title: Use the rate for one group
steps.content: Nora earns $p$ dollars for each block of $w$ hours. The question asks about $42w$ hours, which is $42$ of those same $w$-hour blocks.

steps.title: Scale the earnings
steps.content: Multiply the pay for one block by $42$: $$ 42 \cdot p=42p $$ The answer is A.
